title: An Orefull Lot Of Stuff (OreTastic)
description: This Mod Adds New Ores, Tree Types, Food And Mobs To Minecraft
body:
✅MORE TO COME✅

The Mod Currently Has:

 

Ores:

    Magma ore

    Steel ore

    Ruby Ore

    Titanium Ore

    Lignite Ore (fuel)

 

Food Items: 

    Cheese

    Sandwich

 

Tools:

    Metal Detector (Detects Iron, Copper and Steel Ores)

 

Trees:

   Palm Tree and all Of The Wooden Things You'd expect

 

Other:

    Oil Bucket
